# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment that mounts host directories for our logging agent. The pod needs access to /var/log and /var/lib/docker to collect logs from all containers. This is for our centralized logging system that runs as a DaemonSet.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1 # for versions before v1beta2
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: logging-deployment
  labels:
    app: nginx
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nginx
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nginx
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: nginx
        image: k8s.gcr.io/nginx-slim:0.8
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
          hostPort: 31742 # random number
        volumeMounts: 
        - mountPath: /var/log 
          name: host-dir-var-log
         #  the container’s filesystem should contain /var/log mounted at that location
        - mountPath: /var/lib/docker
          name: host-dir-var-lib-docker
        # the host’s /var/lib/docker and /var/log are available to the pod as volumes
    # each directory on your host is mapped into each container as a volume
       volumes:
      - name: host-dir-var-log 
        hostPath: 
          path: /var/log 
      - name: host-dir-var-lib-docker
        hostPath:
          path:/var/lib/docker
